window_summary: This window tracks the recent rclone/rclone release stream from v1.65.0 through v1.74.2, covering minor and patch releases with their respective changelog references.

questions.query_text: In the rclone/rclone releases, which release provides a changelog link ending with '#v1-69-0-2025-01-12'?

answer_support.answer_text: Full details of the changes can be found in the changelog at https://rclone.org/changelog/#v1-69-0-2025-01-12.

questions.query_text: Across the rclone/rclone releases, how does the changelog reference in v1.65.0 differ from the changelog reference in v1.74.2?

options.text: Both releases reference the same changelog URL.
v1.65.0 does not include a changelog link, while v1.74.2 does.

answer_support.answer_text: Full details of the changes can be found in the changelog at https://rclone.org/changelog/#v1-65-0-2023-11-26.
Full details of the changes can be found in the changelog at https://rclone.org/changelog/#v1-74-2-2026-05-22.
